case_title: NOAH SCHWARZ VS. PAGE STREET BUILDING, LLC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF NOAH SCHWARTZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAGE STREET BUILDING, LLC, REPRESENTED BY AHMED RIAD IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVEIWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHWARZ, NOAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PAGE STREET BUILDING, LLC. DEFENDANT ALSO WAIVES CLAIM FOR MONIES FROM PLAINTIFF FOR BREACH OF LEASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,988.00 FILED BY SCHWARZ, NOAH AS TO DEFENDANT PAGE STREET BUILDING, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHWARZ, NOAH AS TO DEFENDANT PAGE STREET BUILDING, LLC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) AHMED RIAD, PARTNER FILED BY DEFENDANT PAGE STREET BUILDING, LLC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2020 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-07-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PAGE STREET BUILDING, LLC.
